summary: Police Week memorial footage: CBP/Border Patrol honor guard folding a flag and a wreath/plaque presentation, with plain on-screen caption text ('FALLEN AGENTS,' 'OF THE FALLEN'). has_audio is false and there is no music track or cinematic stylization, so it is a straightforward event/ceremony recording with text overlays rather than a music-driven produced spectacle. Out of scope: ceremony recording with caption overlays, no audio/music, not produced.
